title: The new Romo P robovac from drone expert DJI has the most jaw-dropping obstacle avoidance I’ve ever seen
description: Welcome to the future with DJI’s first foray into the pantheon of home cleaning — expensive, but extremely capable.

description: Light up your life with the Philips Hue Omniglow, the best Hue lightstrip yet, which appears simply seamless.

description: The Dreame Miracle Pro feels genuinely different – a dryer that actually improves how your hair looks and feels

description: The Oakcastle MP300 may be simple, but it does enough that your phone doesn't, to fit into certain set-ups.

title: Mammotion LUBA 3 AWD 3000 robot lawn mower — autonomous mowing just got exponentially better for owners of larger landscapes
